finding: Phase 2 is 'Adoption readiness' but ADOPTERS.md lists one adopter (Hedl). Lume/Wyrd (bootstrapped in-session) are not listed/linked. Every adoption signal is self-referential.
recommendation: Add Lume/Wyrd if real active adopters, or rename Phase 2 to 'Internal hardening + deferred-bet resolution' to match reality.

finding: budget_manager is a confirmed culling-candidate (zero rescue cases) carried to Phase 2 with the window extended; ~554 lines of mechanism that has never demonstrably helped.
recommendation: Cut at Phase-2 start, not end. Converges with edge-case (fcntl crash, KeyError) and simplicity (premature locking) findings on the same module.

finding: WORK-0050/0051/0052/0053 are ADR-CLASS items requiring a Proposed ADR before any code; Phase 2 will mint >=4 ADRs before product code. WORK-0053 (reputation) tensions with ADR-003/ADR-025.
recommendation: Decide land/defer/cull now. Cull WORK-0053; defer 0051/0052 to Phase 3; accept/reject 0050 at phase start. They crowd out WORK-0001 (broken) and WORK-0056 (adopter-blocking).

finding: Of 8 Phase-1 watchlist objectives, 6 missed threshold; only 2 became culling-candidates, 4 got extended windows. Failing-threshold reliably yields another deferral, not a cut, despite 'no third deferral' DoD.
recommendation: Hard rule: any once-extended objective that fails again is cut. Apply to routing-table shrink, hooks, workstream templates at the boundary.

finding: 4-5 agent panels run on docs-only changes (WORK-0003 3-line correction, WORK-0014 README) where adversarial lenses have nothing to check; overhead scales with item count not complexity.
recommendation: Tier panel size by change_class; docs-only -> at most 1 mandatory reviewer. Verify dispatch-rules.json already tiers correctly.

finding: WORK-0004 adds a 'Prior art' section to ADR-001..016 — 16 edits, zero product effect; inverts the user-preference to not expand process docs.
recommendation: Cut WORK-0004; if Prior-art matters make it prospective (new ADRs only).

finding: WORK-0010/0011/ADR-031 deferred again; the 5-7 concurrent-workstream threshold is structurally unreachable at N=1 operator; flagged dead-weight by phase-1 existential review.
recommendation: Cull WORK-0010/0011/ADR-031 at Phase-2 start; prose template already serves the case; re-propose from ADR-019 if threshold ever hit.

finding: WORK-0058 (codify WS-SPIKE?) is a one-sentence standards.md decision carried as a full work item with gate lifecycle.
recommendation: Resolve inline in the next standards.md PR; no separate item.

finding: WORK-0035 ships the canonical external-review kit while ADR-028 is still Proposed pending reviews #2/#3 demonstrating value — kit before evidence.
recommendation: Run reviews #2/#3 first; build the kit only if ADR-028 earns Accepted. Make WORK-0035 Phase-3 contingent.
